_meta.note: Third Sunday of Great Lent — Veneration of the Holy Cross (Liturgy of St. Basil the Great, Tone 7)

commemorations.title: Third Sunday of Great Lent — Veneration of the Holy Cross

beatitudes._note: 6 Resurrectional (Octoechos Tone 7) + 4 from Triodion Canon Ode 6. Texts to be sourced.

entranceHymn.text: Come, let us worship and fall down before Christ. O Son of God, who art risen from the dead, save us who sing to Thee: Alleluia!

troparia.text: By Thy Cross Thou didst destroy death. To the thief Thou didst open Paradise. For the Myrrhbearers Thou didst change weeping into joy, and Thou didst command Thy disciples, O Christ God, to proclaim that Thou art risen, granting the world great mercy.
O Lord, save Thy people, and bless Thine inheritance! Grant victories to the Orthodox Christians over their adversaries; and by virtue of Thy Cross, preserve Thy habitation!

kontakia.connector: Glory to the Father, and to the Son, and to the Holy Spirit, now and ever, and unto ages of ages. Amen.
kontakia.text: Now the flaming sword no longer guards the gates of Eden; it has been mysteriously quenched by the wood of the Cross. The sting of death and the victory of hell have been vanquished; for Thou, O my Savior, hast come and cried to those in hell: "Enter again into Paradise!"

trisagion.text: Before Thy Cross, we bow down in worship, O Master, and Thy holy Resurrection we glorify.

prokeimenon.label: Triodion, Tone 6:
prokeimenon.refrain: O Lord, save Thy people, and bless Thine inheritance.
prokeimenon.verse: To Thee, O Lord, will I call. O my God, be not silent to me.

alleluia.label: Triodion, Tone 8:
verses: Remember Thy congregation which Thou hast purchased of old.
God is our King before the ages; He has worked salvation in the midst of the earth.

communionHymn.label: Triodion:
communionHymn.text: The light of Thy countenance has shone on us, O Lord. Alleluia, Alleluia, Alleluia!

saints: the Veneration of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
